name: Main Course Seafood Risotto
recipeIngredient: 1 cup fish stock or clam juice combined with 5 cups water
3/4 pound shrimp, peeled and deveined, cut into thirds
3/4 pound scallops, foot removed and sliced in half, horizontally
Salt and freshly ground black pepper
4 plum tomatoes, seeded and cut into fine dice
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine clam juice or fish stock with 5 cups water in a saucepan and bring to a bare simmer.
2. Heat olive oil in a wide saucepan and cook the onions for 5 minutes or until lightly golden.
3. Add rice and stir, continuously for a couple of minutes to lightly toast it.
4. Add wine and cook gently until almost entirely evaporated.
5. Gradually add 1/2 cup boiling water and stock, stirring constantly, until all liquid is absorbed.
6. Repeat adding 1/2 cup more simmering liquid and stirring the rice until fully absorbed again.
7. Continue this process, adding a full cup of liquid after every 1 1/2 cups added.
8. When rice is halfway cooked (about 15 minutes), cook seafood in another skillet with remaining olive oil.
9. Sauté shrimp and scallops for about a minute or until almost fully cooked.
10. Add seafood to the rice and continue cooking until rice is tender (30-35 minutes total).
11. Remove from heat, add butter, season with salt and pepper, and serve immediately.
12. Garnish with tomatoes and parsley.
Yield: 4 servings
